cast.name: 乔·大卫·摩尔  Joel David Moore

this_title: Halloween Hangover: A Star Wars Story
introduction: In the six-minute short, Imperial Stormtrooper TK-421 undergoes an intense interrogation by the Galactic Empire.Much like how Rogue One filled in gaps in the lore from before A New Hope, Halloween Hangover answers an age-old question following the destruction of the original Death Star.
chinese_title: Halloween Hangover: A Star Wars Story
